# layers.txt — maps corpus files to fixturegit commit layers (PLAN.md §4:
# "a layers.txt (or similar) manifest declaring which files belong to
# which fixturegit commit layer").
#
# Format: one "<layer> <path>" pair per line, blank lines and "#" comment
# lines ignored. <layer> is a 1-based integer; <path> is relative to this
# directory (testdata/corpus/) and is also the path written into the
# fixturegit-built repo's working tree.
#
# Only committed-zone files (.verdi/, minus data/) appear here. Files
# under mutable/ and derived/ model the store's mutable and derived zones,
# which VL-013 forbids git-tracking in the real store — corpus_test.go
# decodes them directly from testdata/corpus/ on disk instead of routing
# them through fixturegit.
#
# Layer 1: never-frozen content only (nothing here can pin a commit,
# since no commit exists yet when these files are first written).
1 .verdi/specs/active/store-layout-notes/spec.md
1 .verdi/specs/active/legacy-cache-policy/spec.md
1 .verdi/diagrams/loansvc-topology.mermaid
1 .verdi/adr/0003-retry-policy.md
1 .verdi/specs/active/new-feature-x/spec.md
#
# Layer 2: frozen content pinned at layer 1's commit (fixturegit Heads[0]).
2 .verdi/adr/0001-outbox-events.md
2 .verdi/adr/0002-outbox-events.md
2 .verdi/attestations/story-1482/ac-2.md
2 .verdi/waivers/story-1482/ac-4.md
2 .verdi/waivers/story-1482/ac-3.md
2 .verdi/conflicts/stale-decline-incident.md
2 .verdi/conflicts/legacy-cache-dispute.md
2 .verdi/conflicts/false-alarm.md
2 .verdi/specs/active/stale-decline/spec.md
#
# Layer 3: the archived closed quartet, frozen at layer 2's commit
# (fixturegit Heads[1]).
3 .verdi/specs/archive/loan-refi-2023/spec.md
3 .verdi/specs/archive/loan-refi-2023/board.json
3 .verdi/specs/archive/loan-refi-2023/rollup.json
3 .verdi/specs/archive/loan-refi-2023/deviation-report.md
